response.overview: In a world where rocks are money, a group of young friends with only pebbles to their name adventure through the struggles of their stone-broke summer. When scheming and scavenging don’t make ends meet, the group packs their bags and sets off, hoping to find what they’ve been looking for.
response.tagline: In a world where rocks are money, a group of young friends with only pebbles to their name adventure through the struggles of their stone-broke summer.
response.title: Pebble Pockets
